dct_title_s:
Wassende-Grade-Kaart van de Ætiopische Ocean beſlooten met de kuﬅen
          van Guinea, Angola, de Caffers, en Brasilia
dct_alternative_sm:
Sea chart of the Atlantic Ocean with the coasts of Guinea, Angola, Caffraria and
          Brazil
dct_description_sm:
"The west coast of Africa is accurately depicted with its numerous Portuguese-named
        harbours." The compass rose radiates numerous rhumb lines.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
